prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Gloomhaven / City of Lions inspired world map for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent surrounded by the Misty Sea, with a grim city harbor on the edge of civilization, dungeon entrance locations, ancient catacomb networks beneath ruined roads, demon-infested ruined citadels, frozen north peaks, dark forest regions, merchant roads, mercenary contract sites, swamp lowlands, cursed moors and ancient Valrath, Quatryl and Aesther ruins.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated dark tactical fantasy atlas, gloomy overcast atmosphere, scenario-map aesthetic, inked relief terrain, muted parchment, dungeon-crawl symbols, grim mercenary fantasy mood.
Composition/framing: wide landscape atlas view, single continent fills most of the frame with surrounding sea and smaller coastal fragments; include a compass, tactical route lines, dungeon icons, ruin markers and subtle regional borders without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, capes, marshy river mouths and varied landforms; include snowy mountains, dark forests, misty seas, bleak plains, swamps, volcanic scars, haunted ruins and subterranean entrance networks.
Avoid: bright heroic fantasy, clean theme-park layout, simple oval continent, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
